feed.title: App Store Discounts（PT）
feed.subtitle: App Store Discounts - Made with love by appstore-discounts(https://github.com/appstore-discounts/appstore-discounts) feedId:206976450490868736+userId:73658201673997312 feedId:206907475259680768+userId:73658201673997312

entry.title: 🎉 Welcome to subscribe to App Store Discounts
entry.summary: Thank you for subscribing to our RSS feed. We are a community-driven project dedicated to bringing the latest App Store discount information to users worldwide. Our goal is to ensure that every user can stay up-to-date with the promotional activities of their favorite apps, whether it's price reductions on the apps themselves or limited-time promotions for in-app purchases. We will cover them all for you!
entry.content:
Thank you for subscribing to our RSS feed. We are a community-driven project dedicated to bringing the latest App Store discount information to users worldwide. Our goal is to ensure that every user can stay up-to-date with the promotional activities of their favorite apps, whether it's price reductions on the apps themselves or limited-time promotions for in-app purchases. We will cover them all for you!

About our RSS feed

  • Focused on delivering App Store app discount information
  • Whenever an app's price drops or in-app purchases go on sale, we will promptly send you a notification
  • Each app's discount information is presented in a separate feed
  • The RSS feed is completely open-source, allowing you to view, contribute, and add your favorite apps at any time

Find Us

App Store Discounts

Finally

If this project has been helpful to you, would you kindly give us a ⭐️

entry.title: Statistical Data Report
entry.content:
Country or Region Tracked

  1. Mainland China(CN)
  2. Hong Kong, China(HK)
  3. Macao, China(MO)
  4. Taiwan, China(TW)
  5. United States(US)
  6. Türkiye(TR)
  7. Portugal(PT)

Statistics of the Number of App Tracked

Category Total Apps Artificially Added Automatically Added Prohibit Push
All 2142 201 1941 100
PT 1847 144 1703 26

View All Apps

Ranking of App Discounts This Month(PT)

Since it supports applications that automatically add tracking based on paid application rankings, most applications are now automatically added, and the quality of the application is unknown and uncontrollable. The current ranking will be used as a reference for subsequent disabling push.

entry.title: Otter - Food & Meal Diary
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：0,99 € → Gratuito [Gratuito ~ 1,99 €]）

All Price Information

Price：Gratuito

Application Description

Otter is a simple and beautiful food diary app that helps you track what you eat every day. No calorie counting, no complicated databases – just take photos, add notes, and reflect on your eating habits. ◆ WHY OTTER? - Clean, minimal design with an adorable otter character - Photo-based meal tracking – snap and save - No ads, no distractions - iCloud sync across all your devices ◆ FEATURES - Photo Food Journal Capture your meals with photos. A picture is worth a thousand calories – see what you eat at a glance. - Daily Notes Write about your day, how you felt, or what made each meal special. - Water Tracker Stay hydrated! Track your daily water intake with simple tap controls. - Weight Log Monitor your weight trends over time with easy-to-read records. - Timeline View Browse your food history in a beautiful timeline. See patterns in your eating habits. - Search & Stats Find past meals quickly and view your eating statistics. - iCloud Sync Your food diary stays safe and syncs automatically across iPhone, iPad, and Mac. ◆ A MINDFUL APPROACH TO EATING Otter doesn't judge. There's no calorie counting or strict diet plans. Just a gentle companion to help you become more aware of what you eat. You are what you eat – let Otter help you remember it. Questions? Contact us at OtterDietDiary@gmail.com

Application Screenshot

iPhone

entry.title: This Aint Even Poker, Ya Joker
entry.id: This Aint Even Poker, Ya Joker-pt-1784497926240
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：2,99 € → 1,99 € [1,99 € ~ 2,99 €]）

All Price Information

Price：1,99 €

Application Description

Bem-vindo a This Ain’t Even Poker, Ya Joker - um jogo incremental único no qual você vira cartas para ganhar dinheiro, melhora sua mão, compra novos baralhos, desbloqueia poderosos aprimoramentos, descobre novas cartas e muito mais. Você conseguirá derrotar o curinga e escapar do carnaval? Steam: Muito positivas, 89% MELHORE SUA MÃO Compre novas cartas para melhorar suas chances de obter mãos boas. Se tiver dinheiro suficiente, você pode até mesmo quebrar as regras e conseguir mais de 5 cartas. ESTABELEÇA SEU DOMÍNIO Ainda que o curinga não goste, você pode comprar novos baralhos para jogar mais de uma mão ao mesmo tempo. Use isso para conseguir a vantagem e aumentar seus números ainda mais rápido. APRIMORE-SE Compre poderosos aprimoramentos utilizando suas merecidas moedas para acelerar seu progresso, abrir novos caminhos e enfrentar o curinga maligno! PARTA EM EXPEDIÇÕES Após desbloquear essa funcionalidade, você pode enviar lacaios em expedições para descobrir novas cartas sobrenaturais com benefícios poderosos. Aprimore essas missões para obter benefícios ainda mais poderosos enquanto avança. Você pode até mesmo desbloquear missões para destruir cartas do seu baralho e garantir que cada mão esteja exatamente da forma que deseja. ALCANCE A GRANDEZA Faça um acordo com o curinga para recomeçar em troca de fichas de pôquer (fichas de pôquer? Mas isso sequer é pôquer...?) e utilize-as para comprar aprimoramentos ainda mais poderosos. ESCAPE DO CASTELO DE CARTAS O curinga prendeu você em seus domínios. Você conseguirá derrotá-lo e escapar? Ou ele vai conseguir manter você lá para sempre em um ciclo sem fim?

entry.title: Descenders
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：9,99 € → 5,99 € [5,99 € ~ 9,99 €]）

All Price Information

Price：5,99 €

Application Description

Decenders é o downhill freeriding extremo na era moderna, com mundos gerados procedimentalmente, e onde os erros têm verdadeiras consequências. Irás levar a tua equipa à glória e tornares-te no próximo Decender lendário? • Mundos gerados procedimentalmente: Enfrenta diferentes saltos, encostas e colinas sempre que jogares. • Controlos de estilo livre: Controla cada movimento subtil do teu ciclista, com um sistema de física elaborado para truques repletos de estilo e fluidez. • Risco vs Recompensa: Faz o teu ciclista alcançar grandes pontuações e combos -- mas falha muitas vezes e podes perder tudo • Constrói a tua reputação: Um sistema de reputação online completo que te permite mostrares o que vales e ganhar novas bicicletas e equipamento • Uma banda sonora totalmente licenciada: a nossa parceria com a Liquicity traz-vos as melhores músicas de drum & bass, perfeitas para enfrentar as montanhas. • Torna-te o próximo Descender: Consegues sobreviver ao jogo todo de uma só vez e chegar às classificações de Decenders lendários? Escolhe uma Equipa, Torna-te uma Lenda Em Decenders, a tua equipa é a tua vida. Quando escolhes uma equipa -- Enemy, Arboreal ou Kinetic -- vais-te unir a outros jogadores que escolheram a mesma côr que tu. Pega na tua bicicleta, escolhe a tua equipa e vive à altura da lenda do teu Descender. Vais juntar-te aos mestres dos truques da Team Enemy, ao estilo proficiente e fora de estrada da Team Arboreal, ou escolherás a veloz e destemida Team Kinetic? • Veste as cores da tua equipa com orgulho e recebe equipamento exclusive • Prémios exclusivos são entregues à equipa com a maior reputação • Ganha acesso ao canal exclusivo da tua equipa no servidor Discord Descenders.

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: LandscapePhotographyHelper Pro
entry.content:
Discount Information

Compras integradas

  • Official Model Library (Yearly)：3,99 € → 0,99 € [0,99 € ~ 3,99 €]

All Price Information

Price：9,99 €

Compras integradas

  • Official Model Library (Yearly)：0,99 €
  • Official Model Library (Monthly)：0,99 €

Application Description

Landscape Photography Helper Pro helps photographers understand and anticipate the alignment of time, light, and celestial motion behind great landscape images. The real challenge is rarely pressing the shutter—it’s being in the right place, at the right time, facing the right direction. Landscape Photography Helper Pro is a powerful photography planning tool that allows you to evaluate light and celestial conditions before heading out, so every shoot begins with clarity rather than guesswork. You can use the timeline to preview the positions of the sun, moon, and Milky Way throughout the day. The 3D compass visualizes their direction and altitude in space, making light behavior intuitive instead of abstract data. With AR mode, you can preview the future positions of celestial objects directly in your real environment and understand how they align with terrain and surroundings. The app also displays important astronomical events such as sunrise, sunset, golden hour, blue hour, and twilight, and allows you to add key moments to your system calendar for reminders. The app provides an unlimited timeline, allowing you to predict celestial positions at any date and time. Advanced planning tools include star trail simulation, virtual viewfinder preview, sun and moon search, mountain identification, and comet position prediction. Comprehensive map planning tools allow you to evaluate shooting conditions at any location. You can view light pollution maps, weather forecasts, and save or reload shooting locations for future planning. Landscape Photography Helper Pro also includes a professional-grade 3D VR terrain prediction system. Built on real elevation data and independent of on-site sensors, it provides stable and repeatable predictions anywhere. You can simulate terrain occlusion, celestial paths, and real camera fields of view before arriving on location, helping you finalize compositions in advance. The app also supports drone composition simulation within the same real 3D terrain environment. You can simulate drone flight altitude and lens perspective before takeoff to verify whether an aerial composition works. The system displays real AGL (Above Ground Level) altitude and horizontal distance to your intended composition point, helping you evaluate height constraints and flight feasibility during the planning stage. This feature assists with composition planning only and does not determine airspace legality or restricted flight zones. An integrated drone database includes common consumer models and camera parameters, allowing simulations to more closely reflect real-world equipment performance. The latest version also introduces building alignment planning. Built-in architectural models can be placed anywhere on the map, scaled to real dimensions, and rotated to match their real orientation. This allows you to plan precise alignments between celestial objects and buildings directly inside VR and drone simulation scenes. You can also import custom .obj 3D models, allowing you to add your own landmarks and use them in planning scenes alongside built-in models. Landscape Photography Helper Pro is not just a tool for viewing information—it is a tool for making decisions. It helps you feel confident before shooting, calm on location, and efficient in creation. Let great photographs be the result of preparation, not chance. Privacy Statement: https://www.landscapehelper.cn/privacy License Agreement: https://www.apple.com/legal/internet-services/itunes/dev/stdeula/

entry.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: BfBB
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：9,99 € → 0,49 € [0,49 € ~ 9,99 €]）

All Price Information

Price：0,49 €

Application Description

Estão prontas, crianças? O clássico cult está de volta, recriado em todo seu esplendor esponjístico! Joguem como Bob Esponja, Patrick e Sandy e mostrem ao Plankton que vale mais a pena trabalhar para o Sr. Siriguejo. Querem salvar a Fenda do Biquíni de robôs? É claro! E saltar de bungee jump em roupas de baixo? Óbvio! Então preparem-se, pois a batalha começou! Recursos: - Jogue como Bob Esponja, Patrick e Sandy e use o conjunto de habilidades únicos de cada um - Detenha o plano diabólico do Plankton de dominar a Fenda do Biquíni com seu exército de robôs malucos - Conheça personagens da série - Remake fiel de um dos melhores jogos já criados do Bob Esponja - Aspectos visuais de ponta, resoluções modernas e jogabilidade melhorada - Suporte total ao controlador - Compatível com Game Center! Obrigado por jogar SpongeBob SquarePants: Battle for Bikini Bottom! Fique de olho nas notícias e dê sua Entre em contato com a HandyGamesTM: www.handy-games.com Curta a gente no Facebook: HandyGames Assine o nosso canal do YouTube: HandyGames Veja as novidades no Twitter: @handy_games Siga-nos no Instagram: handygames © www.handy-games.com GmbH

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Just a Simple Image Converter
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：8,99 € → 3,99 € [Gratuito ~ 8,99 €]）

All Price Information

Price：3,99 €

Application Description

Experience the ultimate image transformation tool with our versatile Image Converter app. Seamlessly convert a wide range of image formats, including JPG, PNG, JPEG, GIF, PDF, WebP, and BMP, all in one convenient application. Whether you need to compress high-resolution images, switch formats for compatibility, or create versatile images for web use, our app has you covered. Enjoy the benefits of bulk image conversion, allowing you to process multiple images simultaneously, saving you time and effort. Our app ensures high-quality conversions with a user-friendly interface, making it suitable for both novice and experienced users. Key Features: Convert images from and to popular formats, including JPG, PNG, JPEG, GIF, PDF, WebP, and BMP. Bulk image conversion for efficient processing. Maintain image quality with high-resolution conversions. Streamlined, easy-to-use interface for a hassle-free experience. Save time and storage space by optimizing your image collection. But that's not all! We also offer seamless sharing options, allowing you to instantly send your converted images to friends, family, or colleagues. Easily share your masterpieces via email, messaging apps, or social media with just a few taps. Enhance your image management and sharing experience by downloading our Image Converter app today. It's the all-in-one solution for your image format conversion and sharing needs.

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.content:
Discount Information

  • Premium：1,99 € → 0,99 € [0,99 € ~ 1,99 €]

All Price Information

Compras integradas

Application Description

Seja bem-vindo à Civilopédia do Sid Meier's Civilization V/VI/VII! Aqui você encontrará descrições detalhadas de todos os aspectos do jogo.

entry.title: Grand Prix Story
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：5,99 € → 1,99 € [1,99 € ~ 5,99 €]）

All Price Information

Price：1,99 €

Application Description

Try your hand at managing an auto racing team! Become the boss of your own team, training drivers and acquiring sponsors before conquering the Grand Prix! Develop new vehicles and parts, and customize them any way you like! Do you have what it takes to make it to the winner's circle? No knowledge of motorsports is required to play! -- Supports iPhone, iPod touch, and iPad. Note: Screen rotation and zoom are only available on iPhone 3GS and later, iPod touch 2nd generation and later, and iPad. The game now lets you switch between English and Japanese. Try searching for "Kairosoft" to see all of our games, or visit us at https://kairopark.jp. Be sure to check out both our free-to-play and our paid games!

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Final Frontier Story
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：7,99 € → 3,99 € [3,99 € ~ 7,99 €]）

All Price Information

Price：3,99 €

Application Description

Build your very own warm and friendly intergalactic city in the cold vacuum of space! Expect close encounters of the third, fourth, and maybe even fifth kind! Aim to become the most desirable city in the galaxy by developing land so you can build shops and bases for your residents to live in comfort. Build Convenience Stores and Parks to make daily life easier, or Takoyaki Stalls and Cinemas to bring in tourists and keep people entertained. Find the perfect combination of facilities to astronomically boost the city's charm. As you explore your new world, you'll encounter all kinds of monsters native to the planet. Stay one step ahead of them by upgrading your Fighter Aircraft and training up your pilots. And who knows, maybe you'll even make a few new friends along the way! With the help of your newfound alien friends, hold outdoor events to bring in tourists from all over the galaxy! Utilize a state-of-the-art autopilot system to help you fight through grueling space battles. You can also give orders to your pilots to guide them to glorious victory. So, do you think you have what it takes to build the best city in the entire galaxy? Jump in the pilot's seat and begin your adventure into the unknown to find out! -- Supports drag to scroll and pinch to zoom. Search for "Kairosoft" to see all of our games, or visit us at http://kairopark.jp Be sure to check out both our free-to-play and paid games! Kairosoft's pixel art game series continues! Follow us on X (Twitter) for the latest Kairosoft news and information. https://twitter.com/kairokun2010

entry.title: Mega Mall Story
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：5,99 € → 1,99 € [1,99 € ~ 5,99 €]）

All Price Information

Price：1,99 €

Application Description

Projete um shopping de proporções épicas! Atraia multidões de clientes e eleve seu status até as 5 estrelas neste jogo de simulação de gestão de shoppings! Construa de tudo, de hamburguerias a restaurantes japoneses, de escadas a elevadores — e até mesmo heliportos — tudo com o toque de um dedo! Quando a popularidade do seu empreendimento alcança um certo patamar, uma "Febre" acontece e seus clientes lotam seu shopping! Você pode então assumir o papel de bom cidadão e investir seu recente patrimônio nas áreas ao redor, atraindo ainda mais clientes! É isso aí! Fique de olho no megaprêmio... Só você pode construir o maior shopping de todos! Busque "Kairosoft" para ver todos os nossos jogos ou visite-nos em https://kairopark.jp. Conheça tanto os nossos jogos grátis quanto os pagos!

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Pocket Academy 3
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：6,99 € → 3,99 € [3,99 € ~ 6,99 €]）

All Price Information

Price：3,99 €

Application Description

Your favorite dream school simulator is back and better than ever! Introducing: The super fun school festival! Build facilities and create a great school environment. Set up classrooms, a cafeteria...and a counseling room! (A little nerve-wracking for students to get called in there!) Place compatible facilities together to create popular spots which will make your school really stand out. As the school's popularity and rep go up, enrollment applications will flood in. Once you get the hang of things, hold a school festival, complete with fun activities for all! Get serious about school clubs, too! Once your students get good enough to breeze through practice matches, enter them into the nationals and help them reach that sweet victory. They may even get scouted for their talent! Help your students prepare for placement tests so they can realize their dreams. Much sweat and many a tear will be shed as you build your ideal school! 12 years since Pocket Academy, we've perfected the recipe for an exciting school management simulator, packing in lots of new features! -- Supports drag to scroll and pinch to zoom. Search for "Kairosoft" to see all of our games, or visit us at https://kairopark.jp Be sure to check out both our free-to-play and our paid games! Kairosoft's pixel art game series continues! Follow us on X(Twitter) for the latest Kairosoft news and information. https://twitter.com/kairokun2010

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Boxing Gym Story
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：7,99 € → 3,99 € [3,99 € ~ 7,99 €]）

All Price Information

Price：3,99 €

Application Description

Introducing a sim with real punch! Are you the manager this down-on-its-luck boxing gym needs to get back on its feet? Get the town excited about boxing, and more people will start signing up. Stand by the ringside to cheer on your boxers. You never know how a match will go until the very end! And don't forget about marketing - fans are the lifeblood of competitive sports! Rack up more wins, and you'll be able to upgrade your facilities with spa baths, high-class cafeterias, and more. Before you know it, athletes will be lining up to join you! Hire trainers and hone your boxers' skills until they're ready to take on the world! Make your gym unique by outfitting it with facilities of your choice, creating the perfect environment for fostering boxing talent. Don't give up until you get that championship belt! Enjoy all the thrills of an underdog boxing story in Kairosoft's latest management sim game! -- Zoom in or adjust the screen size with touch controls. Try searching for "Kairosoft" to see all of our games, or visit us at https://kairopark.jp Be sure to check out both our free-to-play and our paid games! Kairosoft's pixel art game series continues! Follow us on Twitter for the latest Kairosoft news and information. https://twitter.com/kairokun2010

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: TV Studio Story
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：7,99 € → 2,99 € [2,99 € ~ 7,99 €]）

All Price Information

Price：2,99 €

Application Description

Lights, camera, action! Get ready to enter the TV industry... Kairosoft style! In this charming pixel art sim game, you'll create your own shows, deciding everything from the theme and genre down to the set and the performers who star in it. Experiment with different combinations, and you might just have a hit on your hands! Where would a TV show be without its stars? Build rapport with different talent agencies, find performers that specialize in certain genres, and get the studio audience really fired up! Preparation is an important part of any production. Send your staff out to scout new locations, and they'll come back with new themes, genres, and decor items, giving you even more options to work with. Once one show airs, you can start on another right away! Publicize it in magazines, on the radio, or on social media to win new fans. How high will the ratings on your next show be...? It's time to take control of the airwaves and create a hit that will go down in TV history! -- Supports drag to scroll and pinch to zoom. Search for "Kairosoft" to see all of our games, or visit us at http://kairopark.jp Be sure to check out both our free-to-play and paid games! Kairosoft's pixel art game series continues! Follow us on X (Twitter) for the latest Kairosoft news and information. https://twitter.com/kairokun2010

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Dream Park Story
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：6,99 € → 3,99 € [2,99 € ~ 6,99 €]）

All Price Information

Price：3,99 €

Application Description

Throw open the gates to a magical kingdom of fun and thrills! Create and customize your own amusement park. From humble attractions like the teacup ride or trampolines, you'll be able to build up to bigger and better things. You can even hire mascots and hold fantastic parades! What do your visitors like best? How can you improve? There's no better place to check up-to-the-minute feedback than the park's social media. Work hard, and you might attract the attention of famous online influencers! Running out of space to build new rides? No problem! Just call your friendly neighborhood construction company to expand the park grounds. Soon you'll be setting up Ferris wheels, roller coasters, and other large-scale attractions to catch the eyes of prospective customers passing by. Don't forget about mascots - these cute and quirky characters are the first things people will think of when they talk about your park! You'll be able to scout a new mascot every year. Signing one will give you access to special themed areas, like the the Space Zone, Snow Zone, and Desert Zone. Keep increasing your popularity and delight your visitors with spectacular parades! The more impressed your visitors are, the more points you'll earn. These can be used to research new attractions and fixtures or add new functions to existing ones. Give your fans an experience they'll never forget and work your way up through the rankings! Take your first step on the roller coaster ride of amusement park management! What kind of park will YOU create? -- Supports drag to scroll and pinch to zoom. Try searching for "Kairosoft" to see all of our games, or visit us at https://kairopark.jp Be sure to check out both our free-to-play and our paid games! Kairosoft's pixel art game series continues! Follow us on Twitter for the latest Kairosoft news and information. https://twitter.com/kairokun2010

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: High Sea Saga DX
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：7,99 € → 3,99 € [3,99 € ~ 7,99 €]）

All Price Information

Price：3,99 €

Application Description

Well, shiver me timbers! Riches of legend inhumed in secret sites across the world, savage monsters to thwart each turn of your trek, Other pirates looking to scuttle your ship--such maritime mayhem and more await on this finest of swashbuckling simulations! You'll need a trusty team to surmount the odds, not to mention a vessel--so make sure you choose only the savviest of seadogs, and construct a jolly craft of true piratical proportions! So all hands ahoy! With the billow of your dreams against the sails, embark on a saga of the high seas sure to keep that cutlass carving! Try searching for "Kairosoft" to see all of our games!! Try searching for "Kairosoft" to see all of our games, or visit us at https://kairopark.jp. Be sure to check out both our free-to-play and our paid games!

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: All In One Memo
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：3,99 € → Gratuito [Gratuito ~ 3,99 €]）

All Price Information

Price：Gratuito

Application Description

Keep the words, pictures, videos, voice and positions you want to record at any time and anywhere. And there are reminders that you can never forget.

Application Screenshot

iPhone

entry.title: Smart Metronome & Tuner +
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：6,99 € → 5,99 € [3,99 € ~ 6,99 €]）

All Price Information

Price：5,99 €

Application Description

As "Três Joias" da prática musical, unificadas num único ecrã. Metrónomo, Afinador e Gravador. Integrámos as três ferramentas indispensáveis para qualquer músico numa interface elegante e intuitiva. Já não precisa de alternar entre aplicações: mantenha o foco total na sua música. - Precisão profissional: 1/44.100 seg. Tem dúvidas sobre a precisão dos metrónomos digitais? O Smart Metronome controla o tempo e a reprodução de som via hardware, não apenas software. Isto garante um pulso exato, independente da carga do CPU, com uma precisão de 1/44.100 de segundo. É, tecnicamente, como ouvir um CD. - Pêndulo visual ultra-realista Recriámos o movimento físico do metrónomo mecânico. O som é produzido exatamente quando o pêndulo passa pelo centro, permitindo-lhe ver o tempo além de ouvi-lo, proporcionando uma sincronização intuitiva. - Funções exclusivas para maximizar a sua eficiência *** Interface 3 em 1: Tudo ao mesmo tempo** Afine enquanto toca. Grave a sua sessão instantaneamente e analise erros rítmicos visualmente graças à Guia de Metrónomo sobreposta à onda de áudio. *** Modo Repetição: Supere os seus limites** Ideal para treinar passagens difíceis. Comece num tempo lento e aumente a velocidade automaticamente. Configure o tempo inicial, final e o número de repetições para dominar escalas e arpejos com foco total. *** Modo Programa: Para peças complexas** Programe livremente mudanças de compasso, tempo e número de compassos. Perfeito para música contemporânea ou peças com mudanças de ritmo (rit. / accel.). Inclui a exibição de números de ensaio para nunca se perder na partitura. *** Temporizador e Registo (LOG): Gestão total** Gerencie as suas rotinas com o temporizador contínuo. Cada minuto de prática é guardado no LOG, permitindo-lhe visualizar o seu progresso e consistência ao longo do tempo. - Lista de funções principais Interface unificada: Metrónomo, Afinador e Gravador num único ecrã. Personalização: Escolha cores de acordo com o seu estilo e uma grande variedade de sons. Drum Machine: Sons de bateria e percussão de alta qualidade. Setlist: Guarde e organize os tempos de todo o seu repertório. Versatilidade: Excelente para música, mas também para treinos de ginásio ou intervalos. Transforme a sua prática diária numa experiência mais divertida, rigorosa e eficaz com o Smart Metronome!

Application Screenshot

iPad

entry.title: 海拔指南针-水印相机
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：0,99 € → Gratuito [Gratuito ~ 0,99 €]）

All Price Information

Price：Gratuito

Application Description

「海拔指南针」是一款简洁、无广告的指南针与海拔工具，适合登山、徒步、露营和旅行记录。指南针、海拔等核心功能可免费使用，完整版本还提供 iPhone 水印相机和更多个性化能力。 免费核心功能 • 显示方向、海拔、气压、经纬度和附近地址 • 可在 GPS 信息与设备高度计之间切换海拔数据来源（视设备支持情况而定） • 提供水平仪、速度、日出和日落时间等户外信息 • 支持多款指南针表盘、海拔展示主题、明暗外观、字体与单位设置 • 支持主屏幕、锁定屏幕和待机显示小组件 完整版本 需要记录户外照片或进一步自定义海拔展示时，可以选择完整版本： • 高画质 iPhone 水印相机：直接使用 iPhone 相机拍摄，在相机输出的高分辨率照片上添加水印，并非截取屏幕或取景画面 • 照片信息保留：添加水印后仍尽量保留拍摄时间、方向、位置等照片信息，方便在系统相册及其他 App 中继续识别和管理 • 自定义水印内容：记录海拔、气压、经纬度、地址、方向、时间和备注，并配置水印字段、顺序和显示状态 • HDR 水印照片：支持 HDR 的 iPhone 可保留更丰富的明暗细节，也可选择保存为兼容性更好的 JPEG • 海拔展示自定义背景颜色 你可以免费试用完整版本 3 天。试用不会续订或自动扣费；也可以通过一次性 App 内购买永久解锁。App 不包含订阅。此前已付费下载本 App 的用户会自动保留完整版本权益，无需再次购买。 网络与隐私 方向、传感器海拔、气压等核心功能大多可离线使用；附近地址、地图以及 App 内购买和恢复购买需要网络连接。App 不含广告，也不会收集你的个人数据。 权限说明 • 位置：用于 GPS 海拔、经纬度、速度、日出日落、地图和地址 • 运动与健身：用于读取支持设备上的气压与高度计数据 • 相机与照片：仅在使用水印相机拍摄并保存照片时需要 设备能力和测量结果可能因硬件、系统版本、环境与定位信号而有所不同。HDR 水印照片需要 iPhone 12 或更新机型以及 iOS 17 或更新系统；水印相机不支持 iPad。

entry.title: Otter - Food & Meal Diary
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：1,99 € → 0,99 € [0,99 € ~ 1,99 €]）

All Price Information

Price：0,99 €

Application Description

Otter is a simple and beautiful food diary app that helps you track what you eat every day. No calorie counting, no complicated databases – just take photos, add notes, and reflect on your eating habits. ◆ WHY OTTER? - Clean, minimal design with an adorable otter character - Photo-based meal tracking – snap and save - No ads, no distractions - iCloud sync across all your devices ◆ FEATURES - Photo Food Journal Capture your meals with photos. A picture is worth a thousand calories – see what you eat at a glance. - Daily Notes Write about your day, how you felt, or what made each meal special. - Water Tracker Stay hydrated! Track your daily water intake with simple tap controls. - Weight Log Monitor your weight trends over time with easy-to-read records. - Timeline View Browse your food history in a beautiful timeline. See patterns in your eating habits. - Search & Stats Find past meals quickly and view your eating statistics. - iCloud Sync Your food diary stays safe and syncs automatically across iPhone, iPad, and Mac. ◆ A MINDFUL APPROACH TO EATING Otter doesn't judge. There's no calorie counting or strict diet plans. Just a gentle companion to help you become more aware of what you eat. You are what you eat – let Otter help you remember it. Questions? Contact us at OtterDietDiary@gmail.com

Application Screenshot

iPhone

entry.title: Doraemon Dorayaki Shop Story
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：17,99 € → 9,99 € [9,99 € ~ 17,99 €]）

All Price Information

Price：9,99 €

Application Description

Administre uma loja de doces japoneses com o popular personagem de mangá Doraemon e seus amigos. Faça o dorayaki favorito de Doraemon e muitos outros tipos de doces para angariar muitos clientes e virar a sensação da cidade. Faça doces para vender, mostre prateleiras para venda, prepare as mesas e abra a casa para os clientes. Vários personagens do trabalho de Fujiko Fujio visitarão a sua loja! Você conseguirá reconhecer rostos familiares da Time Patrol Bon ou da Kiteretsu Encyclopedia? Encontrar ingredientes para as suas criações culinárias pode ser um grande desafio e você pode ter dificuldades...Use os gadgets secretos de Doraemon para superá-los! A especialidade da área de gerenciamento de Kairosoft combina bem com o charme dos personagens de Fujiko Fujio, proporcionando um jogo divertido e cheio de doces deliciosos. Todo o progresso do jogo é armazenado em seu dispositivo. Os dados ao salvar não podem ser recuperados após serem excluídos ou após reinstalar o aplicativo. A transferência de dados para outro dispositivo não é suportada. Busque "Kairosoft" para ver todos os nossos jogos ou visite-nos em https://kairopark.jp. Conheça tanto os nossos jogos grátis quanto os pagos!

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Black Border 2
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：0,49 € → 0,29 € [0,29 € ~ 1,99 €]）

All Price Information

Price：0,29 €

Application Description

Já imaginou como é estar na linha da frente da segurança nacional? Em Black Border 2, você assume o papel de um agente da Polícia de Fronteira, enfrentando situações desafiantes a cada turno. Com visuais detalhados e jogabilidade envolvente, este jogo oferece uma experiência realista incomparável que coloca você no centro da ação. Assuma a responsabilidade de proteger as fronteiras do seu país contra o contrabando ilegal. Inspecione veículos, reveja documentos e enfrente contrabandistas que tentam traficar drogas, armas e outras mercadorias ilegais. Cada dia traz novos desafios, onde pensamento rápido e visão aguçada são as suas melhores ferramentas. Você é mais do que um simples agente de fronteira — você é a última linha de defesa. Funcionalidades de Black Border 2: Simulação autêntica de patrulha de fronteira: Coloque-se no papel de um verdadeiro agente, onde cada decisão conta e cada interação está carregada de tensão. Inspeção detalhada de documentos: Analise cuidadosamente passaportes, autorizações e outros documentos para decidir quem pode entrar e quem deve ser barrado. Deteção de contrabando: Realize buscas minuciosas em veículos e inspeções pessoais para capturar criminosos que tentam contrabandear mercadorias ilegais. Personagens dinâmicos com IA: Interaja com personagens realistas que reagem e se adaptam com base nas suas decisões e ações. Desafios crescentes: Desde pequenos erros em documentos até grandes redes de contrabando, enfrente missões cada vez mais intensas que vão testar os seus limites.

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Just a Simple Image Converter
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：5,99 € → Gratuito [Gratuito ~ 5,99 €]）

All Price Information

Price：Gratuito

Application Description

Experience the ultimate image transformation tool with our versatile Image Converter app. Seamlessly convert a wide range of image formats, including JPG, PNG, JPEG, GIF, PDF, WebP, and BMP, all in one convenient application. Whether you need to compress high-resolution images, switch formats for compatibility, or create versatile images for web use, our app has you covered. Enjoy the benefits of bulk image conversion, allowing you to process multiple images simultaneously, saving you time and effort. Our app ensures high-quality conversions with a user-friendly interface, making it suitable for both novice and experienced users. Key Features: Convert images from and to popular formats, including JPG, PNG, JPEG, GIF, PDF, WebP, and BMP. Bulk image conversion for efficient processing. Maintain image quality with high-resolution conversions. Streamlined, easy-to-use interface for a hassle-free experience. Save time and storage space by optimizing your image collection. But that's not all! We also offer seamless sharing options, allowing you to instantly send your converted images to friends, family, or colleagues. Easily share your masterpieces via email, messaging apps, or social media with just a few taps. Enhance your image management and sharing experience by downloading our Image Converter app today. It's the all-in-one solution for your image format conversion and sharing needs.

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: SOULVARS
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：5,99 € → 1,99 € [1,99 € ~ 5,99 €]）

All Price Information

Price：1,99 €

Application Description

JRPG "SOULVARS" de construção de decks está agora disponível! 15-20 horas de jogo (+50h para serem mais profundas) Animação e batalhas dinâmicas de pixels e um rico sistema de personalização Sem compras no aplicativo. Embora tenham um profundo sentido estratégico, os controles verticais de smartphones helly Helly permitem batalhas simples e emocionantes, treinamento, exploração de masmorras e coleção de itens encantados aleatórios. ▼ História Uma linha mundial na qual até o conceito de ficção da alma pode ser convertido em dados. Em troca, a vida das pessoas é sediada pelo aparecimento repentino de deformidades. Os protagonistas usam o Soul Driver, um dispositivo que converte almas em dados. Eles são responsáveis ​​pelas eliminatias dessa ameaça e trabalham em uma certa cidade ... ▼ Visão geral do sistema Número de slots de salvamento: 3 (salvo no dispositivo e salvamento manual) Cenário estimado Tempo de compressão: 14 a 20 horas 50 a 100 mais de horas de desafio pós-claro Características Bits Soul (Handbills), que são o poder da alma que reside em engrenagens (equipamentos), Os jogadores podem combiná -los em batalha fazer ataques e combos especiais de maneira sucessiva. Os personagens são caracterizados por sua ação com pontos que se movem. ▼ equipamento e bits de alma Os bits de alma (cartões manuais) podem ser extraídos da engrenagem (equipamento) e usados ​​como batalha de astição. As combinações da arma principal, subweapon, armadura e acessórios A estratégia (deck) é determinada. ▼ Artes Durante uma batalha, apenas um bit de alma pode ser selecionado no primeiro turno, mas O número de bits da alma pode ser selecionado no tempo aumenta, dependendo das fraquezas do oponente, guardando, evitando, fugindo, polindo e várias outras condições. A combinação de bits de alma (cartões na mão) selecionada ao mesmo tempo ativa uma habilidade chamada Arts.

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Flick Home Run !
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：0,99 € → 0,29 € [0,29 € ~ 0,99 €]）

All Price Information

Price：0,29 €

Compras integradas

  • PowerLevel_5up：3,99 €
  • AllLevel_5up：9,99 €
  • PowerLevel_1Up：0,99 €
  • ContactLevel_5up：3,99 €
  • Called Shot 50：9,99 €
  • Called Shot 4：0,99 €
  • GOLD BAT：17,99 €
  • AllLevel_1up：2,99 €
  • EyeLevel_5up：3,99 €
  • EyeLevel_1up：0,99 €

Application Description

■ ■ ■ Appstore BEST of 2012 (PAID/GROSSING) ■ ■ ■ Flick your finger and make a homerun. You can experience a real baseball batting through the physical pendulum. This is a game in which you can experience various throws based on the pendulum. The ball will fly further if you can hit the ball directly with the quick flick. Experience a “real-life like” batting simulation. ■ Easy Control--------------------------- You only use flick to control the batting for this game. The more accurate you flick your finger to hit the ball; it is more likely that you will be a home-run hitter. The rule is simple. Flick your finger with the same feeling in which you would swing a bat in real life. Think of your finger as a bat, and flick it with speed and accuracy. That’s all. ■ Movement of the ball------------------ Various kinds of throws are materialized into “real-life like” feelings. Different pitches pull out different various kinds of movements. Thus, the batter may miss the timing and would be hard to hit. ■ 10 GAME mode------------------------ You can enjoy this game through 5 kinds of mode. Minor & Major Mode- Hit as many home-runs as you can; as far as you can. Multiplayer Mode- You can compete with other players via Game Center. Moon-Star Mode- Try for a record with the given 9 balls. Training Mode- You can practice with different kinds of pitches. *Bunt mode ( need minor 15step): Drop the ball on the target of the floor correctly. *Total mode ( need bunt 10000 point ) : You’ll meet many different types of the balls from the beginning of the game. *Faster & faster ( need total 25000 point ) : Head-to-head with only fastballs. *Jiant mode ( need F&F 10000 point ) : Match with a Giant pitcher *Cutter mode ( need Jiant 12000 point ) : Match with cutterballs which can cut the baseball bat. ■ add 28 Achievement Bonus-------------- 1 Achievement = 1 level up bonus!!! ■ Level Up System----------------------- You can choose and upgrade 1 of 3 skills every time the exp becomes full.- Power: You can increase the power of the bat Accuracy: You can increase the accuracy of the batting Batting Eye: You can know ahead of the next ball’s pattern ■ Home-Run Tip!--------------------------- 1.Make a full swing with a fast batting-speed! 2.Hit the ball followed from the various thrown pattern with an accurate swing! 3.Let’s keep an eye on the ball until the end and predict the change of the pattern! 4.Let’s be confident and make a full swing! ■ FAQ ------------------------------------- Q : How does STEP UP SYSTEM? A : STEP UP = More balls ex) Minor 1 step = 3 balls Minor 2 step = 6 balls

Application Screenshot

iPhone

entry.title: where I put it
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：0,99 € → Gratuito [Gratuito ~ 0,99 €]）

All Price Information

Price：Gratuito

Application Description

A simple cleanup management app that will quickly find your search! Do you have trouble Looking for items? Find your item quickly with "where I put it”! Build a house, make furniture, assign lockers, and put all your belongings. Books, important collections, hobby tools, children's toys, seasonal clothes, and items of recollections, the app will help you organize all things in the house.

Application Screenshot

iPhone

entry.title: Digline: Cozy Mining
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：2,99 € → 0,99 € [0,99 € ~ 3,99 €]）

All Price Information

Price：0,99 €

Application Description

Digline é um jogo de perfuração relaxante e fácil de aprender, onde cada descida é uma pequena aposta entre progresso e risco, e a verdadeira recompensa está mais fundo no subsolo. Comece cada partida na sua oficina, escolha sua configuração e desça com combustível limitado e um equipamento improvisado. Abra caminho através de camadas de terra em constante mudança, decida o que coletar e escolha o momento certo para voltar antes que tudo se esgote. Cada descida revela novos materiais, descobertas mais raras e padrões inesperados sob a superfície. O que começa como uma simples escavação gradualmente se transforma em um equilíbrio cuidadoso entre exploração, eficiência e tempo. De volta à superfície, refine sua estratégia e melhore suas partidas: • Melhore sua perfuradora, capacidade de combustível e eficiência • Desbloqueie novos materiais de maior valor e localizados mais profundamente • Otimize rotas para maximizar cada descida O progresso se acumula de forma constante, mas cada partida carrega tensão. Se jogar com muita cautela, você deixa valor para trás. Se avançar demais, corre o risco de perder tudo. Defina seu próprio ritmo no subsolo: partidas curtas e eficientes, descidas profundas de alto risco ou uma progressão constante rumo ao domínio do que está abaixo. Top 10 jogos casuais nos Estados Unidos e no Reino Unido, Top 5 na Alemanha, Noruega e outros. Venha se juntar à diversão! O que começa como uma simples busca por recursos gradualmente se torna algo mais estranho. Seus antigos túneis permanecem, seu mapa se expande com o tempo, e o subsolo passa a parecer menos aleatório e mais como um lugar com sua própria história. Digline foi projetado para ser fácil de começar, divertido em sessões curtas e recompensador no longo prazo. Escavações rápidas, descidas curtas, muita diversão relaxante. Recursos: • controles intuitivos com um dedo em modo retrato • partidas curtas que cabem facilmente em um ou dois minutos • túneis persistentes e um mapa que cresce a cada expedição • múltiplas regiões subterrâneas com diferentes materiais, perigos e surpresas • recursos para coletar e usar na criação de melhorias e melhor preparação • uma oficina que transforma cada partida bem-sucedida em progresso permanente • um sistema de mercado para negociar o que você traz de volta • progressão que se constrói ao longo de muitas sessões, não apenas uma única partida • uma atmosfera calma e aconchegante com um senso de descoberta por baixo • sem anúncios, sem compras dentro do aplicativo e sem sistemas pay-to-win • conquistas e competição no placar do Daily Dig Quanto mais fundo você vai, mais a mina revela.
